item.title: DR Congo: Floods and Landslides - Mar 2025
item.description:
Affected country: Democratic Republic of the Congo
Glide: FL-2025-000050-COD

Heavy seasonal rains have caused rivers to overflow in eastern provinces of the Democratic Republic of the Congo, flooding homes and displacing thousands of people. Authorities report several deaths and damage to roads and bridges.

item.title: Argentina: Floods - Mar 2025
item.description:
Affected country: Argentina
Glide: FL-2025-000040-ARG

Torrential rains hit the city of Bahía Blanca in Buenos Aires province, causing widespread flooding.
